title: George Preparatory School celebrates Best of George double award
description: BUSINESS NEWS - George Preparatory School is...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - George Preparatory School is proudly grateful for the recognition we received in the Best of George awards as both the best pre-primary school and the best primary school in George for 2025.


> We want to extend a heartfelt thank you to the public who voted for us. Your loyalty and support are, and will always remain, a source of encouragement.


Voorbereidingskool George is in 1951 gestig en het, gestand aan sy leuse van ‘Groei’, deur die jare uitgebrei tot 28 akademiese klasse (7 per graad vanaf graad R tot graad 3), een rekenaarklas en vier leerondersteuningsklasse.

Daar is tans 854 leerders. Me. Linda Jordaan, wat reeds vanaf April 1991 aan die skool verbonde is, is tans die skoolhoof.

As a values-driven school, we especially live out and instil the values of respect, responsibility, and honesty in the hearts of our learners.

Our holistic approach creates growth opportunities not only academically, but also on the sports field, in cultural activities, and in everyday situations where discipline is part of learning.

Our vision is that after four formative years with us, learners can look back on a journey of growth and success.

Ons kyk gereeld in dankbaarheid terug op ’n kleurryke verlede; wetend dat hierdie skool koesterend en beskermend binne ons Vader se hand lê.

Ons maak Hom doelbewus die middelpunt van ons verlange, ons besluite, ons leefwêreld. Saam met Hom strek ons uit na dit wat Hy vir ons in die toekoms beplan.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
